ModMetaData.name: [RealRim] GravshipRewired
ModMetaData.author: SIGSEGV111
ModMetaData.description:
Adds power-aware gravship preparation and launch behavior on top of Odyssey.
Project URL: https://github.com/SIGSEGV111/RealRimGravshipRewired License: AGPL-3.0
- Gravship parts require power: grav core 100 W, pilot console 100 W, small thruster 10 W, large thruster 50 W. - The pilot console shows a new "Prepare for launch" command. - Preparing for launch spools the grav engine for 2 in-game hours before launch is allowed. - Spool-up consumes continuous power based on ship size: 15 Wd per connected gravship tile over 2 hours. - Once fully prepared, the grav engine keeps consuming the full spool power to stay ready. - If power fails during spool-up or while prepared, spool-up is canceled and all invested energy is lost. - Starting Prepare for launch shows a warning because it immediately escalates threats: present raiders attack at once and dormant mech clusters wake up and attack. - Launch stays close to vanilla Odyssey: crew assignment, gathering, target selection, final confirmation, and takeoff remain standard. - Odyssey's built-in grav-engine post-launch cooldown is removed. - The grav core glow grows brighter as spool charge increases, and a completion notification is shown when the engine is fully charged. - The grav engine and pilot console show spool/prepared status in inspect text.
